session.assistant:
**make fast-ci failed**: Multiple issues found
## Summary
- **Lint**: 3 errors - **Format Check**: Passed (1738 files formatted) - **Prettier Check**: Passed - **Markdown Check**: Passed - **Exec Reference Check**: Passed - **ty**: Passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 20 failed, 5863 passed - **Tests (erk-dev)**: All passed (138 tests) - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: All passed (123 tests) - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: All passed (50 tests)
## Lint Errors (3 issues)
**File**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_config.py:5:49` - **F401**: `erk_slots.config.PoolConfig` imported but unused (fixable with --fix)
**File**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_project_config.py:398:9` - **F811**: Redefinition of unused `test_loads_plans_repo` (previously defined at line 262)
**File**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_project_config.py:412:9` - **F811**: Redefinition of unused `test_loads_post_create_commands` (previously defined at line 247)
## Test Failures (20 failures)
All failures are related to pool configuration refactoring:
### AttributeError: 'LoadedConfig' object has no attribute 'pool_size' (5 failures) - `tests/unit/cli/test_config_worktree.py::test_load_local_config_reads_from_specified_path` - `tests/unit/cli/test_config_worktree.py::test_load_local_config_returns_defaults_when_missing` - `tests/unit/cli/test_config_worktree.py::test_config_worktree_scenario` - `tests/unit/cli/test_config_worktree.py::test_config_loading_ignores_worktree_config`
### TypeError: unexpected keyword argument 'pool_size' or 'pool_checkout_shell' (2 failures) - `tests/unit/cli/test_project_config.py::TestMergeConfigsWithLocal::test_uses_base_when_local_none` - `tests/unit/cli/test_project_config.py::TestMergeConfigsWithLocal::test_local_shell_overrides_base`
### AssertionError: Invalid key 'pool.max_slots' or 'pool.checkout.*' (11 failures) - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_set_pool_max_slots_zero` - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_list_shows_pool_max_slots` - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_set_local_writes_to_local_config` - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_set_local_short_flag` - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_set_local_pool_checkout_shell` - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_set_local_pool_checkout_commands` - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_set_repo_flag_writes_to_config_toml` - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_set_repo_flag_short_form` - `tests/commands/setup/test_config.py::test_config_list_shows_pool_source_annotation`
### RuntimeError: Not in a git repository (2 failures) - `tests/core/test_slot_allocation.py::TestGetPoolSize::test_returns_default_when_no_config` - `tests/core/test_slot_allocation.py::TestGetPoolSize::test_returns_default_when_pool_size_not_set`
### AttributeError: 'ErkContext' object has no attribute 'with_overrides' (2 failures) - `tests/core/test_slot_allocation.py::TestGetPoolSize::test_returns_configured_pool_size` - `tests/core/test_slot_allocation.py::TestGetPoolSize::test_returns_small_pool_size`
